members.name: GetBaseSceneState
members.summary: Returns the [SceneState] of the scene that this scene inherits from, or [code]null[/code] if it doesn't inherit from any scene.

members.name: GetConnectionBinds
members.summary: Returns the list of bound parameters for the signal at [param idx].

members.name: GetConnectionCount
members.summary: Returns the number of signal connections in the scene. The [code]idx[/code] argument used to query connection metadata in other [code]get_connection_*[/code] methods in the interval [code][0, get_connection_count() - 1][/code].

members.name: GetConnectionFlags
members.summary: Returns the connection flags for the signal at [param idx]. See [enum Object.ConnectFlags] constants.

members.name: GetConnectionMethod
members.summary: Returns the method connected to the signal at [param idx].

members.name: GetConnectionSignal
members.summary: Returns the name of the signal at [param idx].

members.name: GetConnectionSource
members.summary: Returns the path to the node that owns the signal at [param idx], relative to the root node.

members.name: GetConnectionTarget
members.summary: Returns the path to the node that owns the method connected to the signal at [param idx], relative to the root node.

members.name: GetConnectionUnbinds
members.summary: Returns the number of unbound parameters for the signal at [param idx].

members.name: GetNodeCount
members.summary: Returns the number of nodes in the scene. The [code]idx[/code] argument used to query node data in other [code]get_node_*[/code] methods in the interval [code][0, get_node_count() - 1][/code].

members.name: GetNodeGroups
members.summary: Returns the list of group names associated with the node at [param idx].

members.name: GetNodeIndex
members.summary: Returns the node's index, which is its position relative to its siblings. This is only relevant and saved in scenes for cases where new nodes are added to an instantiated or inherited scene among siblings from the base scene. Despite the name, this index is not related to the [param idx] argument used here and in other methods.

members.name: GetNodeInstance
members.summary: Returns a [PackedScene] for the node at [param idx] (i.e. the whole branch starting at this node, with its child nodes and resources), or [code]null[/code] if the node is not an instance.

members.name: GetNodeInstancePlaceholder
members.summary: Returns the path to the represented scene file if the node at [param idx] is an [InstancePlaceholder].

members.name: GetNodeName
members.summary: Returns the name of the node at [param idx].

members.name: GetNodeOwnerPath
members.summary: Returns the path to the owner of the node at [param idx], relative to the root node.

members.name: GetNodePath
members.signature: public NodePath GetNodePath(int idx, bool forParent)
members.summary: Returns the path to the node at [param idx]. If [param for_parent] is [code]true[/code], returns the path of the [param idx] node's parent instead.

members.name: GetNodePropertyCount
members.summary: Returns the number of exported or overridden properties for the node at [param idx]. The [code]prop_idx[/code] argument used to query node property data in other [code]get_node_property_*[/code] methods in the interval [code][0, get_node_property_count() - 1][/code].

members.name: GetNodePropertyName
members.signature: public StringName GetNodePropertyName(int idx, int propIdx)
members.summary: Returns the name of the property at [param prop_idx] for the node at [param idx].

members.name: GetNodePropertyValue
members.signature: public Variant GetNodePropertyValue(int idx, int propIdx)
members.summary: Returns the value of the property at [param prop_idx] for the node at [param idx].

members.name: GetNodeType
members.summary: Returns the type of the node at [param idx].

members.name: GetPath
members.summary: Returns the resource path to the represented [PackedScene].

members.name: IsNodeInstancePlaceholder
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the node at [param idx] is an [InstancePlaceholder].

values.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_DISABLED
values.summary: If passed to [method PackedScene.instantiate], blocks edits to the scene state.

values.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_INSTANCE
values.summary: If passed to [method PackedScene.instantiate], provides inherited scene resources to the local scene. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.

values.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN
values.summary: If passed to [method PackedScene.instantiate], provides local scene resources to the local scene. Only the main scene should receive the main edit state. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.

values.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN_INHERITED
values.summary: If passed to [method PackedScene.instantiate], it's similar to [constant GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN], but for the case where the scene is being instantiated to be the base of another one. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.

constants.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_DISABLED
constants.summary: If passed to [method PackedScene.instantiate], blocks edits to the scene state.

constants.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_INSTANCE
constants.summary: If passed to [method PackedScene.instantiate], provides inherited scene resources to the local scene. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.

constants.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN
constants.summary: If passed to [method PackedScene.instantiate], provides local scene resources to the local scene. Only the main scene should receive the main edit state. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.

constants.name: GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN_INHERITED
constants.summary: If passed to [method PackedScene.instantiate], it's similar to [constant GEN_EDIT_STATE_MAIN], but for the case where the scene is being instantiated to be the base of another one. [b]Note:[/b] Only available in editor builds.
